title: Aster DM Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Aster DM Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Aster DM Healthcare has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Mysuru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Aster DM Healthcare:
Aster DM Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aster DM Healthcare!
